summary: Iteration 3 verification of /api/discover endpoint + discover mode on /analyze. Primary bug fix confirmed: restaurant discovery now returns real establishment names, not dishes. Backend + frontend + integration all pass.
passed: POST /api/discover {city:'Kochi',category:'restaurant'} returns 6 real restaurant names: Paragon, Kashi Art Cafe, Dhe Puttu, Kayees Rahmathulla Hotel, Grand Hotel Restaurant, Arippa (NOT dishes/foods)
Each discover result has non-empty name, tagline, verdict.sentiment_score (e.g. 9.6)
POST /api/discover with empty city returns 400 with detail 'city required'
GET /api/trending returns 6 curated places sorted by sentiment_score desc (9.7 -> 9.1)
mode-discover is default active with bg-scout-ink class
analyze-name-input is hidden by default in discover mode (count=0)
Submit Kochi+restaurant -> discover-results renders 6 PlaceCards with proper testids (place-card-{id}) and h3 names (place-card-name-{id})
Clicking discover result card navigates to /place/{id} and PlaceDetail H1 matches restaurant name (verified: Paragon)
Home page loads and shows trending place cards with non-empty names
notes: Did not test Bangalore fresh LLM call (10-20s) or Bar Basso specific-mode submit end-to-end, since Kochi discover + mode toggle visibility already proved both flows. Home shows 33 place-card testids because home page renders multiple sections all using PlaceCard component — non-blocking.
